key.name: terminal
key.description: Custom terminal command used only when the terminal profile is set to Custom. The SSH command is appended after it (e.g. "gnome-terminal --" or "ghostty -e").

key.name: terminal-profile
key.description: Selected terminal preset for SSH. Empty value preserves backward compatibility: old saved custom commands behave as Custom, otherwise Auto detection is used.

key.name: ssh-default-user
key.description: Pre-filled username when opening an SSH connection. Defaults to the current system user if empty.

key.name: ssh-usernames
key.description: Remembers the last SSH username used for each VM, keyed by VM name.
